_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of the definition of collection management and collection management authority.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of reference data management principles, including reference data taxonomy, governance of controlled vocabularies, and change management for reference data updates.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-K-004 (DG, cosine: 0.455), DG-K-009 (DG, cosine: 0.448).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.397). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, management]. DCWF-only terms [authority, collection, definition] vs WIDAI-only terms [change, controlled, data, governance, principles, reference] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.892 (P=0.921, R=0.866). P exceeds R by 0.055 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.3%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of the definition of collection management and collection management a" and "Knowledge of reference data management principles, including reference data taxo". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.461 > STS 0.397 (gap +0.065). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, management] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 21.1%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, management]. DCWF-only: [authority, collection, definition]. WIDAI-only: [change, controlled, data, governance, principles, reference].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 99.3% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
